name: Annoy the Moon Man
hint: If it is the 27th and it did not rain, there is a small chance of a full moon appearing at the top right of the screen. Clicking it 11 times will cause the man in the moon to reveal himself..

name: ...Bigfoot?
hint: Witness a large shadowy figure walking after sunset in Pelican Town, Cindersap Forest, at the bus stop, and at the wooded area north of the farm..

name: Free The Forsaken Souls
hint: Turn a child into a dove, then watch TV on Fall 26.. (Requires Sinister Signal Item)

name: 'Me me me me'
hint: Go to the Summit before achieving Perfection..

name: Sea Monster Sighting
hint: Very rarely, a green creature may appear south of the main docks at the beach..

name: Iridium Stackmaster
hint: When the player picks up items, a stack is displayed on the left of the screen. Get 1 million..

name: Strange Sighting
hint: Obtain a Strange Capsule, let it break, and later witness a strange shadowy figure roaming around Pelican Town or the bus stop after sunset..
